clues.clue: Hard work and drink as a minor diversion
Play it again, Sam? Initially, say no
She is a sort to go flying
Houses or new digs rebuilt around lakes
Obsolete engine to come alive most surprisingly
I had back injury ending in all-out seizure
A little like those guiding beliefs
Number of staff supplied by chief nobleman
Do a balancing act with increased salary
Keep complaining about one’s first dart
One eating ice-cream right to swallow whole
Drives away or is parking in reversing snow vehicle
Detective seizes hot pants in India

competition.prizeinfo: The prize for the first correct solution to be opened will be an original edition of League of the Lexicon, the bestselling quiz game about words and language, created by Joshua Blackburn, author of The Language-Lover’s Lexipedia. The Collins English Dictionary & Thesaurus will be awarded for the next three. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is 23:59 on the first Saturday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Sunday Times Crossword 5214, PO Box 29, Colchester, Essex CO2 8GZ.
